result:
Runs and exits cleanly.

## Round 14 Complete: Frequency Analysis Overlay

**What was built:** Press `f` to toggle a new visualization mode that analyzes the last 64 frames of timeline history and color-codes every cell by its oscillation period using autocorrelation:

| Color | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Ice blue | Still life (never changes) |
| Emerald green | Period 2 (blinkers, beacons) |
| Gold | Period 3 (pulsars) |
| Orange | Period 4-5 |
| Coral/Magenta | Period 6-32 |
| Hot red | Chaotic (no clear period) |

Alive cells render brighter, "off-phase" cells dimmer — revealing the full spatial extent of each oscillator. A legend panel appears in the bottom-left. Analysis auto-refreshes every 8 generations.

**Balance:** This is exploration-heavy (entirely new analytical lens on temporal structure) grounded in exploitation (leverages the timeline ring buffer from R10, the cell_color pipeline, and the overlay rendering pattern from minimap/rule editor).
